name: dragshock
description: a dragon that flies and has a Electric aura.

moves.name: ⚡flash
moves.desc: a superfast attack thathas a 67% chance to paralyze the opponent.

moves.name: ⚡eletcro pole
moves.desc: the fakemon spawns a giant pole and tries to electrocute the enemy with it.

moves.name: ⚡thunder bolt
moves.desc: the fakemon shoots a bunch of thunder bolts at the enemy until five of them hits the enemy.

moves.name: ⚡mega zeus
moves.desc: the fakemon spawns a gigantic thunderbolt and shoots it at the enemy one time and causes a huge explosion.

moves.name: ⚡dragons awakening
moves.desc: the dragon powers up two a stronger mode.
